subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the divine and mighty cord! The essence of guidance is the fear of God and heavenly piety, and this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بحبل متین الهی جوهر هدی تقوای ربانیست و خشیت الهی و این وقتی در
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
